TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_O_kakawaw_no_tiyaay_ho_a_Pangcah, title = O_kakawaw_no_tiyaay_ho_a_Pangcah, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/O_kakawaw_no_tiyaay_ho_a_Pangcah} }

S.FORM: == O kakawaw no tiyaay ho a Pangcah == O kakawaw no ti:yaca o Pangcah hananay a caykalecad O aro' hananay no Pangcah haw, namakayni saamisan tiya enaenaran,saenaenaran kakitiraan tangsa itini Taito,midungdung tu liyaliyalan tangsa itira satimulan,aru mililisaytu tuliyalay iri,kutilianay tu niniyan no Pangcah, namaka amis tangsa i satimulan, masa enaenaran kitiraantu no Pangcah. O aluemulung no tamdawiri, makasabawtusa spat a emang, o sipakayni i itini Pangcah hananay a sausi haw,saalumanayi iniyan o saamisan a Pangcah . Iniyanhantu no maayaway a tayni maaru' itini kitakitaan haw, saaluma:nay hananayi inaPangcah hananay, nayti:yaca o notiya aayaw nikaorip no mita haw, terungan nuniyan kakawaw no sademak hananayi, no babahiyamin taterungan sademaken, tatengilan no lalabu' no luma'. Caykalecalecad ko kakitiraan caykasasi:rod sisa, caytu kalecad kiniyan kakawaw to sademaken a kakawaw, nikalecalecapu amalakumud to kakaenen. Iniyanhananay o Pangcah hananay, sikakawaay toyu hanaratyu hanasakeru' a tamdaw, to mama:annaca sademaken nohenihaw, ini:yanaca o sakero' atu itiniyan ratyu sapatangasa noheni tunisimsiman, saayaway a maorip tina kitakitaani, repethan noheni kono Amis a ratyu atu keru'. O sakaselaselal amin no babainayhan maoripay, sipakaniamin no pirikec to masaselaselalay no babainay ko duduen,sipakayni selaselalay a rikec hananayi, ira ko ratiu atu dademaken, atu raan tarakaw apuyu' a nipangangan, namahansisa ira ko masitudungay masirumuday hananay a nikasaniyaro' to kakawaw, dodohantu no babahi kuyau nikasatakaraw adidi' hananay a nika tuas no nikaorip a ngangan no heni, ira ko duduan no babahi aminanuwang to kakawaw noheni. Bayniyaniyaroi iraca koyo tomok hananayhaw, oya'an kilemelay ko silaheciay ko demak a melawankya , ora'an ko makananuwangay toniyan binawlan. Iniyan tomok hananayi,o kilemelay hananay, tangasa i nika caytu pakademak nira kya, pakutayhantu koyo tomok hnanay. Iniyanhantu o Pangcah hananayhaw, o adihay:ay koyo laliwamaan no heny to paoripay a nipisiket, aminamin to to:oedamin nikananuwang nohenyi, miliwa:maaca toniyn maoripay hananay a kawas. Yumi salisalisin satu tuyu paoripayi, aitini kitasa sasa no bekeloh' sasa no serasa, a tataratu kita pademungtu kita sa. Amansa nicumudetu niniyan namakayraay satipany hananay a tamdawi, ira kyatayniyai o kilistokiw tinsokiw siliyaskiw sananay, totu kinatayniyai a miburiburay tina Pangcah. Yusibuduy ko babahi, maulah tuyu lahengangay atu yumuhtingay, oyaan o tarirengan no heni a sasabuduiyan hananayi, o buetingay lahengangay, o laengangay buetingay a kulit, sibuduysa kora babainayi, oyaan o kutemkuteman a kulit, sasasatui o muhtingay satalipan, lahengangay sapitalakes. Babainay ato babahi, o sukun no babahi hananay, sipakayraamin itini ihyakulit a misapinang to bana'kia. O kakawaw nipidudu no Pangcah hananay tuniyan o kakawaw haw, yumangabilay amin itini hekalhaw, babahi amin, noneng:sa ko babainay a mitengil, maripayayhaw o babahiyu, solinay kilemelay a dademakan hananayhaw babainay amin sikakawaway itini butal hnanay, matiya raricay o tiroshaw,o nobabahi kuraan a kakawaw. O kilemelay to baluco' saanayiri, makakalatay o babahi amin.O atekakay koya nisimsim, mabanaay mi tarimecmec:ay to kakawaw. O naayayai a nikaramuramud hananay haw, mikadabu amin kiniyan babainay a tara itini babahiyan, caypitengteng to babahi, babainay ko tayraay a midapu', yutayraay midapo'i, a mimelawhan tuyu kakawaw amin yalalabu' no luma' a minanam to sademakansa, ano bulat alamaananayi o mihecaan, iraysisa itini Pangcah hananayhaw, mikadabo' hananay sipaseneng no heny kiraan waway to kadabo' hananay, sipakayni pikadabo' no nira ko pisumuwad tuya lalabu no luma' kakawaw. Tuyamahaen nau:nsatu ko Pangcah ababainay a mikadabo', sakasaan masumuwad masumuwad noniyan o taywan,o tayniyai maka tekalay a tamdaw, yomikadabuay hananayi awaaytu caytuka aluman anini, masumuwad kiniyan o namaka tekalay yamaoripay a tayni itini. O sakaorip hananay itini lalabo' no loma'i, taynitayni no babainayan, arw absa'tu ko kakawaw no babahi hananay a kakawaw, catu pitengiltu no babahi, maserep maserep koniya o kakawaw no babahi, araw maberah catu kawyaan.
S.PHON: == o~u kakawaw no~u tijaaj ħo~u a paŋʦaħ == o~u kakawaw no~u ti:jaʦa o~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj a ʦajkaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ o~u aro~uʡ ħananaj no~u paŋʦaħ ħaw, namakajni saamisan tija ənaənaran,saənaənaran kakitiraan taŋsa itini taito~u,miɬ~ɮo~u~uŋɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u ɾijaɾijaɾan taŋsa itira satimo~u~uɾan,aro~u~u miɾiɾisajto~u~u to~u~uɾijaɾaj iri,ko~u~utiɾianaj to~u~u ninijan no~u paŋʦaħ, namaka amis taŋsa i satimo~u~uɾan, masa ənaənaran kitiraanto~u~u no~u paŋʦaħ. o~u aɾo~u~uəmo~u~uɾo~u~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮawiri, makasab~b~vawto~u~usa spat a əmaŋ, o~u sipakajni i itini paŋʦaħ ħananaj a sao~u~usi ħaw,saaɾo~u~umanaji inijan o~u saamisan a paŋʦaħ . inijanħanto~u~u no~u maajawaj a tajni maaro~u~uʡ itini kitakitaan ħaw, saaɾo~u~uma:naj ħananaji inapaŋʦaħ ħananaj, najti:jaʦa o~u no~utija aajaw nikao~urip no~u mita ħaw, təro~u~uŋan no~u~unijan kakawaw no~u saɬ~ɮəmak ħananaji, no~u b~b~vab~b~vaħijamin tatəro~u~uŋan saɬ~ɮəmakən, tatəŋiɾan no~u ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~uʡ no~u ɾo~u~umaʡ. ʦajkaɾəʦaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u kakitiraan ʦajkasasi:ro~uɬ~ɮ sisa, ʦajto~u~u kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ kinijan kakawaw to~u saɬ~ɮəmakən a kakawaw, nikaɾəʦaɾəʦapo~u~u amaɾako~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ to~u kakaənən. inijanħananaj o~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj, sikakawaaj to~ujo~u~u ħanaratjo~u~u ħanasakəro~u~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw, to~u mama:annaʦa saɬ~ɮəmakən no~uħəniħaw, ini:janaʦa o~u sakəro~uʡ ato~u~u itinijan ratjo~u~u sapataŋasa no~uħəni to~u~unisimsiman, saajawaj a mao~urip tina kitakitaani, rəpətħan no~uħəni ko~uno~u amis a ratjo~u~u ato~u~u kəro~u~uʡ. o~u sakasəɾasəɾaɾ amin no~u b~b~vab~b~vainajħan mao~uripaj, sipakaniamin no~u pirikəʦ to~u masasəɾasəɾaɾaj no~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj ko~u ɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uən,sipakajni səɾasəɾaɾaj a rikəʦ ħananaji, ira ko~u ratio~u~u ato~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən, ato~u~u raan tarakaw apo~u~ujo~u~uʡ a nipaŋaŋan, namaħansisa ira ko~u masito~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj masiro~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮaj ħananaj a nikasanijaro~uʡ to~u kakawaw, ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~uħanto~u~u no~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi ko~u~ujao~u~u nikasatakaraw aɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiʡ ħananaj a nika to~u~uas no~u nikao~urip a ŋaŋan no~u ħəni, ira ko~u ɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uan no~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi aminano~u~uwaŋ to~u kakawaw no~uħəni. b~b~vajnijanijaro~ui iraʦa ko~ujo~u to~umo~uk ħananajħaw, o~ujaʡan kiɾəməɾaj ko~u siɾaħəʦiaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak a məɾawankja , o~uraʡan ko~u makanano~u~uwaŋaj to~unijan b~b~vinawɾan. inijan to~umo~uk ħananaji,o~u kiɾəməɾaj ħananaj, taŋasa i nika ʦajto~u~u pakaɬ~ɮəmak nira kja, pako~u~utajħanto~u~u ko~ujo~u to~umo~uk ħnanaj. inijanħanto~u~u o~u paŋʦaħ ħananajħaw, o~u aɬ~ɮiħaj:aj ko~ujo~u ɾaɾiwamaan no~u ħənj to~u pao~uripaj a nipisikət, aminamin to~u to~u:o~uəɬ~ɮamin nikanano~u~uwaŋ no~uħənji, miɾiwa:maaʦa to~unijn mao~uripaj ħananaj a kawas. jo~u~umi saɾisaɾisin sato~u~u to~u~ujo~u~u pao~uripaji, aitini kitasa sasa no~u b~b~vəkəɾo~uħʡ sasa no~u sərasa, a tatarato~u~u kita paɬ~ɮəmo~u~uŋto~u~u kita sa. amansa niʦo~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮəto~u~u ninijan namakajraaj satipanj ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮawi, ira kjatajnijai o~u kiɾisto~ukiw tinso~ukiw siɾijaskiw sananaj, to~uto~u~u kinatajnijai a mib~b~vo~u~urib~b~vo~u~uraj tina paŋʦaħ. jo~u~usib~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj ko~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi, mao~u~uɾaħ to~u~ujo~u~u ɾaħəŋaŋaj ato~u~u jo~u~umo~u~uħtiŋaj, o~ujaan o~u tarirəŋan no~u ħəni a sasab~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uijan ħananaji, o~u b~b~vo~u~uətiŋaj ɾaħəŋaŋaj, o~u ɾaəŋaŋaj b~b~vo~u~uətiŋaj a ko~u~uɾit, sib~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~ujsa ko~ura b~b~vab~b~vainaji, o~ujaan o~u ko~u~utəmko~u~utəman a ko~u~uɾit, sasasato~u~ui o~u mo~u~uħtiŋaj sataɾipan, ɾaħəŋaŋaj sapitaɾakəs. b~b~vab~b~vainaj ato~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi, o~u so~u~uko~u~un no~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi ħananaj, sipakajraamin itini iħjako~u~uɾit a misapinaŋ to~u b~b~vanaʡkia. o~u kakawaw nipiɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u no~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj to~u~unijan o~u kakawaw ħaw, jo~u~umaŋab~b~viɾaj amin itini ħəkaɾħaw, b~b~vab~b~vaħi amin, no~unəŋ:sa ko~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj a mitəŋiɾ, maripajajħaw o~u b~b~vab~b~vaħijo~u~u, so~uɾinaj kiɾəməɾaj a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan ħananajħaw b~b~vab~b~vainaj amin sikakawawaj itini b~b~vo~u~utaɾ ħnanaj, matija rariʦaj o~u tiro~usħaw,o~u no~ub~b~vab~b~vaħi ko~u~uraan a kakawaw. o~u kiɾəməɾaj to~u b~b~vaɾo~u~uʦo~uʡ saanajiri, makakaɾataj o~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi amin.o~u atəkakaj ko~uja nisimsim, mab~b~vanaaj mi tariməʦməʦ:aj to~u kakawaw. o~u naajajai a nikaramo~u~uramo~u~uɬ~ɮ ħananaj ħaw, mikaɬ~ɮab~b~vo~u~u amin kinijan b~b~vab~b~vainaj a tara itini b~b~vab~b~vaħijan, ʦajpitəŋtəŋ to~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi, b~b~vab~b~vainaj ko~u tajraaj a miɬ~ɮapo~u~uʡ, jo~u~utajraaj miɬ~ɮapo~uʡi, a miməɾawħan to~u~ujo~u~u kakawaw amin jaɾaɾab~b~vo~u~uʡ no~u ɾo~u~umaʡ a minanam to~u saɬ~ɮəmakansa, ano~u b~b~vo~u~uɾat aɾamaananaji o~u miħəʦaan, irajsisa itini paŋʦaħ ħananajħaw, mikaɬ~ɮab~b~vo~uʡ ħananaj sipasənəŋ no~u ħənj kiraan wawaj to~u kaɬ~ɮab~b~vo~uʡ ħananaj, sipakajni pikaɬ~ɮab~b~vo~uʡ no~u nira ko~u piso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u~uja ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~u no~u ɾo~u~umaʡ kakawaw. to~u~ujamaħaən nao~u~u:nsato~u~u ko~u paŋʦaħ ab~b~vab~b~vainaj a mikaɬ~ɮab~b~vo~uʡ, sakasaan maso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ maso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ no~unijan o~u tajwan,o~u tajnijai maka təkaɾaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, jo~umikaɬ~ɮab~b~vo~u~uaj ħananaji awaajto~u~u ʦajto~u~uka aɾo~u~uman anini, maso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ kinijan o~u namaka təkaɾaj jamao~uripaj a tajni itini. o~u sakao~urip ħananaj itini ɾaɾab~b~vo~uʡ no~u ɾo~umaʡi, tajnitajni no~u b~b~vab~b~vainajan, arw ab~b~vsaʡto~u~u ko~u kakawaw no~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi ħananaj a kakawaw, ʦato~u~u pitəŋiɾto~u~u no~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi, masərəp masərəp ko~unija o~u kakawaw no~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi, araw mab~b~vəraħ ʦato~u~u kawjaan.
S.FORM: == O kakawaw no tiyaay ho a Pangcah == O kakawaw no ti:yaca o Pangcah hananay a caykalecad O aro' hananay no Pangcah haw, namakayni saamisan tiya enaenaran,saenaenaran kakitiraan tangsa itini Taito,midungdung tu liyaliyalan tangsa itira satimulan,aru mililisaytu tuliyalay iri,kutilianay tu niniyan no Pangcah, namaka amis tangsa i satimulan, masa enaenaran kitiraantu no Pangcah. O aluemulung no tamdawiri, makasabawtusa spat a emang, o sipakayni i itini Pangcah hananay a sausi haw,saalumanayi iniyan o saamisan a Pangcah . Iniyanhantu no maayaway a tayni maaru' itini kitakitaan haw, saaluma:nay hananayi inaPangcah hananay, nayti:yaca o notiya aayaw nikaorip no mita haw, terungan nuniyan kakawaw no sademak hananayi, no babahiyamin taterungan sademaken, tatengilan no lalabu' no luma'. Caykalecalecad ko kakitiraan caykasasi:rod sisa, caytu kalecad kiniyan kakawaw to sademaken a kakawaw, nikalecalecapu amalakumud to kakaenen. Iniyanhananay o Pangcah hananay, sikakawaay toyu hanaratyu hanasakeru' a tamdaw, to mama:annaca sademaken nohenihaw, ini:yanaca o sakero' atu itiniyan ratyu sapatangasa noheni tunisimsiman, saayaway a maorip tina kitakitaani, repethan noheni kono Amis a ratyu atu keru'. O sakaselaselal amin no babainayhan maoripay, sipakaniamin no pirikec to masaselaselalay no babainay ko duduen,sipakayni selaselalay a rikec hananayi, ira ko ratiu atu dademaken, atu raan tarakaw apuyu' a nipangangan, namahansisa ira ko masitudungay masirumuday hananay a nikasaniyaro' to kakawaw, dodohantu no babahi kuyau nikasatakaraw adidi' hananay a nika tuas no nikaorip a ngangan no heni, ira ko duduan no babahi aminanuwang to kakawaw noheni. Bayniyaniyaroi iraca koyo tomok hananayhaw, oya'an kilemelay ko silaheciay ko demak a melawankya , ora'an ko makananuwangay toniyan binawlan. Iniyan tomok hananayi,o kilemelay hananay, tangasa i nika caytu pakademak nira kya, pakutayhantu koyo tomok hnanay. Iniyanhantu o Pangcah hananayhaw, o adihay:ay koyo laliwamaan no heny to paoripay a nipisiket, aminamin to to:oedamin nikananuwang nohenyi, miliwa:maaca toniyn maoripay hananay a kawas. Yumi salisalisin satu tuyu paoripayi, aitini kitasa sasa no bekeloh' sasa no serasa, a tataratu kita pademungtu kita sa. Amansa nicumudetu niniyan namakayraay satipany hananay a tamdawi, ira kyatayniyai o kilistokiw tinsokiw siliyaskiw sananay, totu kinatayniyai a miburiburay tina Pangcah. Yusibuduy ko babahi, maulah tuyu lahengangay atu yumuhtingay, oyaan o tarirengan no heni a sasabuduiyan hananayi, o buetingay lahengangay, o laengangay buetingay a kulit, sibuduysa kora babainayi, oyaan o kutemkuteman a kulit, sasasatui o muhtingay satalipan, lahengangay sapitalakes. Babainay ato babahi, o sukun no babahi hananay, sipakayraamin itini ihyakulit a misapinang to bana'kia. O kakawaw nipidudu no Pangcah hananay tuniyan o kakawaw haw, yumangabilay amin itini hekalhaw, babahi amin, noneng:sa ko babainay a mitengil, maripayayhaw o babahiyu, solinay kilemelay a dademakan hananayhaw babainay amin sikakawaway itini butal hnanay, matiya raricay o tiroshaw,o nobabahi kuraan a kakawaw. O kilemelay to baluco' saanayiri, makakalatay o babahi amin.O atekakay koya nisimsim, mabanaay mi tarimecmec:ay to kakawaw. O naayayai a nikaramuramud hananay haw, mikadabu amin kiniyan babainay a tara itini babahiyan, caypitengteng to babahi, babainay ko tayraay a midapu', yutayraay midapo'i, a mimelawhan tuyu kakawaw amin yalalabu' no luma' a minanam to sademakansa, ano bulat alamaananayi o mihecaan, iraysisa itini Pangcah hananayhaw, mikadabo' hananay sipaseneng no heny kiraan waway to kadabo' hananay, sipakayni pikadabo' no nira ko pisumuwad tuya lalabu no luma' kakawaw. Tuyamahaen nau:nsatu ko Pangcah ababainay a mikadabo', sakasaan masumuwad masumuwad noniyan o taywan,o tayniyai maka tekalay a tamdaw, yomikadabuay hananayi awaaytu caytuka aluman anini, masumuwad kiniyan o namaka tekalay yamaoripay a tayni itini. O sakaorip hananay itini lalabo' no loma'i, taynitayni no babainayan, arw absa'tu ko kakawaw no babahi hananay a kakawaw, catu pitengiltu no babahi, maserep maserep koniya o kakawaw no babahi, araw maberah catu kawyaan.
S.PHON: == o~u kakawaw no~u tijaaj ħo~u a paŋʦaħ == o~u kakawaw no~u ti:jaʦa o~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj a ʦajkaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ o~u aro~uʡ ħananaj no~u paŋʦaħ ħaw, namakajni saamisan tija ənaənaran,saənaənaran kakitiraan taŋsa itini taito~u,miɬ~ɮo~u~uŋɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u ɾijaɾijaɾan taŋsa itira satimo~u~uɾan,aro~u~u miɾiɾisajto~u~u to~u~uɾijaɾaj iri,ko~u~utiɾianaj to~u~u ninijan no~u paŋʦaħ, namaka amis taŋsa i satimo~u~uɾan, masa ənaənaran kitiraanto~u~u no~u paŋʦaħ. o~u aɾo~u~uəmo~u~uɾo~u~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮawiri, makasab~b~vawto~u~usa spat a əmaŋ, o~u sipakajni i itini paŋʦaħ ħananaj a sao~u~usi ħaw,saaɾo~u~umanaji inijan o~u saamisan a paŋʦaħ . inijanħanto~u~u no~u maajawaj a tajni maaro~u~uʡ itini kitakitaan ħaw, saaɾo~u~uma:naj ħananaji inapaŋʦaħ ħananaj, najti:jaʦa o~u no~utija aajaw nikao~urip no~u mita ħaw, təro~u~uŋan no~u~unijan kakawaw no~u saɬ~ɮəmak ħananaji, no~u b~b~vab~b~vaħijamin tatəro~u~uŋan saɬ~ɮəmakən, tatəŋiɾan no~u ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~uʡ no~u ɾo~u~umaʡ. ʦajkaɾəʦaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u kakitiraan ʦajkasasi:ro~uɬ~ɮ sisa, ʦajto~u~u kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ kinijan kakawaw to~u saɬ~ɮəmakən a kakawaw, nikaɾəʦaɾəʦapo~u~u amaɾako~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ to~u kakaənən. inijanħananaj o~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj, sikakawaaj to~ujo~u~u ħanaratjo~u~u ħanasakəro~u~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw, to~u mama:annaʦa saɬ~ɮəmakən no~uħəniħaw, ini:janaʦa o~u sakəro~uʡ ato~u~u itinijan ratjo~u~u sapataŋasa no~uħəni to~u~unisimsiman, saajawaj a mao~urip tina kitakitaani, rəpətħan no~uħəni ko~uno~u amis a ratjo~u~u ato~u~u kəro~u~uʡ. o~u sakasəɾasəɾaɾ amin no~u b~b~vab~b~vainajħan mao~uripaj, sipakaniamin no~u pirikəʦ to~u masasəɾasəɾaɾaj no~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj ko~u ɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uən,sipakajni səɾasəɾaɾaj a rikəʦ ħananaji, ira ko~u ratio~u~u ato~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən, ato~u~u raan tarakaw apo~u~ujo~u~uʡ a nipaŋaŋan, namaħansisa ira ko~u masito~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj masiro~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮaj ħananaj a nikasanijaro~uʡ to~u kakawaw, ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~uħanto~u~u no~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi ko~u~ujao~u~u nikasatakaraw aɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiʡ ħananaj a nika to~u~uas no~u nikao~urip a ŋaŋan no~u ħəni, ira ko~u ɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uan no~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi aminano~u~uwaŋ to~u kakawaw no~uħəni. b~b~vajnijanijaro~ui iraʦa ko~ujo~u to~umo~uk ħananajħaw, o~ujaʡan kiɾəməɾaj ko~u siɾaħəʦiaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak a məɾawankja , o~uraʡan ko~u makanano~u~uwaŋaj to~unijan b~b~vinawɾan. inijan to~umo~uk ħananaji,o~u kiɾəməɾaj ħananaj, taŋasa i nika ʦajto~u~u pakaɬ~ɮəmak nira kja, pako~u~utajħanto~u~u ko~ujo~u to~umo~uk ħnanaj. inijanħanto~u~u o~u paŋʦaħ ħananajħaw, o~u aɬ~ɮiħaj:aj ko~ujo~u ɾaɾiwamaan no~u ħənj to~u pao~uripaj a nipisikət, aminamin to~u to~u:o~uəɬ~ɮamin nikanano~u~uwaŋ no~uħənji, miɾiwa:maaʦa to~unijn mao~uripaj ħananaj a kawas. jo~u~umi saɾisaɾisin sato~u~u to~u~ujo~u~u pao~uripaji, aitini kitasa sasa no~u b~b~vəkəɾo~uħʡ sasa no~u sərasa, a tatarato~u~u kita paɬ~ɮəmo~u~uŋto~u~u kita sa. amansa niʦo~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮəto~u~u ninijan namakajraaj satipanj ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮawi, ira kjatajnijai o~u kiɾisto~ukiw tinso~ukiw siɾijaskiw sananaj, to~uto~u~u kinatajnijai a mib~b~vo~u~urib~b~vo~u~uraj tina paŋʦaħ. jo~u~usib~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj ko~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi, mao~u~uɾaħ to~u~ujo~u~u ɾaħəŋaŋaj ato~u~u jo~u~umo~u~uħtiŋaj, o~ujaan o~u tarirəŋan no~u ħəni a sasab~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uijan ħananaji, o~u b~b~vo~u~uətiŋaj ɾaħəŋaŋaj, o~u ɾaəŋaŋaj b~b~vo~u~uətiŋaj a ko~u~uɾit, sib~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~ujsa ko~ura b~b~vab~b~vainaji, o~ujaan o~u ko~u~utəmko~u~utəman a ko~u~uɾit, sasasato~u~ui o~u mo~u~uħtiŋaj sataɾipan, ɾaħəŋaŋaj sapitaɾakəs. b~b~vab~b~vainaj ato~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi, o~u so~u~uko~u~un no~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi ħananaj, sipakajraamin itini iħjako~u~uɾit a misapinaŋ to~u b~b~vanaʡkia. o~u kakawaw nipiɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u no~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj to~u~unijan o~u kakawaw ħaw, jo~u~umaŋab~b~viɾaj amin itini ħəkaɾħaw, b~b~vab~b~vaħi amin, no~unəŋ:sa ko~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj a mitəŋiɾ, maripajajħaw o~u b~b~vab~b~vaħijo~u~u, so~uɾinaj kiɾəməɾaj a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan ħananajħaw b~b~vab~b~vainaj amin sikakawawaj itini b~b~vo~u~utaɾ ħnanaj, matija rariʦaj o~u tiro~usħaw,o~u no~ub~b~vab~b~vaħi ko~u~uraan a kakawaw. o~u kiɾəməɾaj to~u b~b~vaɾo~u~uʦo~uʡ saanajiri, makakaɾataj o~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi amin.o~u atəkakaj ko~uja nisimsim, mab~b~vanaaj mi tariməʦməʦ:aj to~u kakawaw. o~u naajajai a nikaramo~u~uramo~u~uɬ~ɮ ħananaj ħaw, mikaɬ~ɮab~b~vo~u~u amin kinijan b~b~vab~b~vainaj a tara itini b~b~vab~b~vaħijan, ʦajpitəŋtəŋ to~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi, b~b~vab~b~vainaj ko~u tajraaj a miɬ~ɮapo~u~uʡ, jo~u~utajraaj miɬ~ɮapo~uʡi, a miməɾawħan to~u~ujo~u~u kakawaw amin jaɾaɾab~b~vo~u~uʡ no~u ɾo~u~umaʡ a minanam to~u saɬ~ɮəmakansa, ano~u b~b~vo~u~uɾat aɾamaananaji o~u miħəʦaan, irajsisa itini paŋʦaħ ħananajħaw, mikaɬ~ɮab~b~vo~uʡ ħananaj sipasənəŋ no~u ħənj kiraan wawaj to~u kaɬ~ɮab~b~vo~uʡ ħananaj, sipakajni pikaɬ~ɮab~b~vo~uʡ no~u nira ko~u piso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u~uja ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~u no~u ɾo~u~umaʡ kakawaw. to~u~ujamaħaən nao~u~u:nsato~u~u ko~u paŋʦaħ ab~b~vab~b~vainaj a mikaɬ~ɮab~b~vo~uʡ, sakasaan maso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ maso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ no~unijan o~u tajwan,o~u tajnijai maka təkaɾaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, jo~umikaɬ~ɮab~b~vo~u~uaj ħananaji awaajto~u~u ʦajto~u~uka aɾo~u~uman anini, maso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ kinijan o~u namaka təkaɾaj jamao~uripaj a tajni itini. o~u sakao~urip ħananaj itini ɾaɾab~b~vo~uʡ no~u ɾo~umaʡi, tajnitajni no~u b~b~vab~b~vainajan, arw ab~b~vsaʡto~u~u ko~u kakawaw no~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi ħananaj a kakawaw, ʦato~u~u pitəŋiɾto~u~u no~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi, masərəp masərəp ko~unija o~u kakawaw no~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi, araw mab~b~vəraħ ʦato~u~u kawjaan.
